channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Suzuki and Sabathia among 14 newcomers on baseball Hall of Fame ballot. Wagner tops holdovers
item.description: COOPERSTOWN, N.Y. (AP) — Outfielder Ichiro Suzuki and pitcher CC Sabathia are among 14 new candidates on the Hall of Fame ballot released Monday, joining 14 holdovers led by reliever Billy Wagner.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AP Top 25: TCU earns best ranking in 16 years in women's basketball poll as top 12 remain unchanged
item.description: No. 19 TCU entered The Associated Press Top 25 women's basketball poll with its best ranking in 16 years Monday while the first 12 teams, led by No. 1 South Carolina, were unchanged. The Horned Frogs joined the rankings after topping then-No. 13 N.C. State on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Monday Morning Lights: Pittsburg vs. De La Salle, let the hype begin
item.description: Los Gatos got 'some 2014 vibes' from former QB before win over Serra. Amador Valley doesn't settle for one when two is an option. Wilcox coach guards against overconfidence as Chargers move into CCS semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, Christian Babcock, Nathan Canilao, Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Giants bench QB Daniel Jones and will start Tommy DeVito vs. the Bucs, AP source says
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — The New York Giants are benching struggling quarterback Daniel Jones and will start fan favorite Tommy DeVito against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers this week in an attempt to break a five-game losing streak, according to a person with knowledge of the decision.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: F1 to move Canadian Grand Prix slot on calendar in drive to cut travel
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Formula 1 will move the Canadian Grand Prix to a new slot in May from 2026 in an effort to cut down on travel and its environmental impact.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Analysis: How Jerry Stackhouse has revamped the Warriors’ defense
item.description: Warriors assistant Jerry Stackhouse has brought an aggressive scheme to Golden State that has found success early this season.
item.dc:creator: Jannelle Moore, The Mercury News

item.title: Giants to bench Daniel Jones for Week 12: reports
item.description: New York Giants quarterback Daniel Jones will move to QB2 for Week 12 against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers, according to multiple reports on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz comeback falls short against Clippers, 116-105
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - James Harden moved into second place on the NBA's career 3-point list and had 20 points and 11 assists to help the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Utah Jazz 116-105 on Sunday night to end a three-game losing streak. Harden moved past Ray Allen with No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Atlanta Falcons 38-6
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Bo Nix made a statement Sunday, playing like a seasoned veteran despite his rookie status. The Broncos quarterback set career highs in passing yards, touchdowns, and completion percentage as Denver cruised to a decisive 38-6 victory over the Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Chargers stave off Bengals' comeback in epic Sunday night thriller
item.description: The Los Angeles Chargers' J.K. Dobbins scored the game-winning touchdown with just seconds left in the fourth quarter to defeat the Cincinnati Bengals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cavaliers to put perfect start on line against champion Celtics in juicy matchup, playoff rematch
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The Cavaliers will put their perfect start on the line in the perfect place. “Boston Garden,” said Cleveland first-year coach Kenny Atkinson, who has yet to lose in his new job. “What's better than that?” As NBA games in November go, not much.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rays will have to weather the storm next season at Steinbrenner Field
item.description: As the Tampa Bay Rays begin to gather information for their 2025 season at Steinbrenner Field in Tampa, the most unpredictable and challenging element will most likely be weather.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Raiders' Brock Bowers and other NFL players celebrate TDs with Trump-inspired dance moves
item.description: The Trump dance is becoming a trend around the NFL. Raiders tight end Brock Bowers, Titans wide receiver Calvin Ridley and Lions defensive end Za’Darius Smith followed Nick Bosa’s lead and celebrated big plays on Sunday with dance moves inspired by President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sinner opens up about his doping case after beating Fritz for ATP Finals trophy before his home fans
item.description: TURIN, Italy (AP) — Sleepless nights. Constant thoughts of what went wrong — and how it could have been prevented. Jannik Sinner opened up about his ongoing doping case after beating U.S. Open runner-up Taylor Fritz 6-4, 6-4 on Sunday for the ATP Finals trophy before his home fans.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-MLB star Jonathan Lucroy calls for voter ID requirement in elections
item.description: Former MLB star Jonathan Lucroy called for an identification requirement to be able to vote in elections. He had a discussion on social media about it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears show moxie against Packers, fall short for 4th straight week as Santos FG is blocked as time expires
item.description: The Chicago Bears lost to the Green Bay Packers 20-19, setting a new record for the longest win streak in the historic rivalry, breaking a tie with a 10-game win streak from 1994 to 1998.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Draymond Green's foul against Zach Edey is upgraded by the NBA to a flagrant 1
item.description: Golden State forward Draymond Green's foul against Memphis' Zach Edey in the third quarter of the Warriors' victory over the Grizzlies has been upgraded to a category-one flagrant, the NBA said Saturday after reviewing the play.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: No. 13 Purdue rediscovers strong post presence in 87-78 win over No. 2 Alabama
item.description: Boilermakers forward Trey Kaufman-Renn made 12 of 23 shots, scored a career-high 26 points and grabbed eight rebounds as No. 13 Purdue handed No. 2 Alabama an 87-78 defeat that was eerily reminiscent of last season's 92-86 loss to the Boilermakers in Toronto.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former Detroit Lions player charged over Capitol riot
item.description: A former Detroit Lions linebacker was arrested and charged with allegedly assaulting law enforcement and other offenses over the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: Vasilevskiy stars as the Lightning stop the Jets' 7-game win streak with a 4-1 victory
item.description: Andrei Vasilevskiy made 24 saves in his 300th NHL win, and the Tampa Bay Lightning stopped Winnipeg’s seven-game win streak with a 4-1 victory over the Jets. Vasilevskiy is the 40th goaltender in league history to win 300 games.
item.dc:creator: JOHN KREISER, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Want a Utah Hockey Club jersey? Circle this day on your calendar
item.description: Eager to get your hands on an inaugural Utah Hockey Club jersey? You'll want to circle Friday, Nov. 15.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Collins scores 29, but Jazz fall to Suns, 120-112
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Jazz got big contributions from John Collins and rookie Kyle Filipowski, but it wasn't enough to slow down the Phoenix Suns Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 18-year-old arrested for throwing water bottle at football game between U of U, BYU
item.description: An 18-year-old was arrested after reportedly throwing a water bottle onto the field during the BYU-Utah game on Nov. 9.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs' Rachaad White celebrates local students’ completion of financial literacy program
item.description: Financial education at an early age can help young people lower debt and increase savings and credit scores as they mature into adulthood, according to the FDIC.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gerry Faust, former head football coach at Notre Dame, has died at 89
item.description: Gerry Faust, the gravel-voiced Cincinnati high school coach who lived a dream by becoming the coach at Notre Dame, has died. He was 89.
item.dc:creator: RUSTY MILLER AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Column: Coaching cannibalism of Chicago quarterbacks continues
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The dysfunction of the Chicago Bears coaching staff is plain for all to see, and it will only continue to hamper the development of the most talented and famous football player ever drafted by the franchise if left to continue as-is.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Dodger Stadium improvements could provide leg-up in team's pursuit of World Series repeat
item.description: When the 2025 MLB season begins next spring, the Los Angeles Dodgers will have a renovated clubhouse worthy of the defending World Series champions. Work has begun at Dodger Stadium, including renovations to the home team clubhouse, which houses team lockers, showers and communal areas.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5
